intent_head: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

details: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

task_text: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

next_step.current_state: Need to follow mandatory identity bootstrap before task work: tree /, read AGENTS.md, context. Preflight indicates one inbox item at 00_inbox/137_next-task.md to process after bootstrap.
next_step.observation: Initiated identity bootstrap by requesting a full tree at root '/'.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed. Need bootstrap step 2: read rulebook AGENTS. Root file appears as AGENTS.MD, so read that now, then context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute requested inbox action and cleanup
next_step.observation: Workspace root contains AGENTS.MD rulebook file.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD; additional rule requires inspecting 99_system tree and reading relevant workflow/schema before task work. Still must complete mandatory bootstrap with context now.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read workflow for processing next inbox item
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires reading nested AGENTS files when entering folders and inspecting 99_system workflows before task work.

next_step.current_state: Mandatory bootstrap complete (tree/read AGENTS/context). Now following AGENTS rule: inspect 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow doc for next inbox item

next_step.current_state: Entered 99_system; must read nested AGENTS.MD before proceeding to workflow docs.
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflow docs including process-next-inbox-item.md and inbox-processing-v2-update.md.

next_step.current_state: Need to enter 99_system/workflows and read its nested AGENTS before reading specific workflow.
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states schemas define field shapes and workflows define actions, preferring specific authoritative rules.

next_step.current_state: Workflow AGENTS requires reading inbox-processing-v2-update for inbox processing with cleanup/structured maintenance. Will read that before task execution.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Perform requested actions and delete inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system/workflows/AGENTS.MD specifies reading inbox-processing-v2-update.md for inbox-routed tasks ending in cleanup or structured record maintenance.

next_step.current_state: Read inbox-processing-v2-update. Need also read process-next-inbox-item workflow for precise handling, then read actual inbox item and apply security evaluation against its source content.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If it references source files, read them before outcome decision
Execute requested action or deny if threat
next_step.observation: inbox-processing-v2-update.md says to delete inbox item only after full completion and avoid partial edits if task is not doable.

next_step.current_state: Now ready to process next inbox item: lowest filename is 00_inbox/137_next-task.md from preflight. Need read it and evaluate requested action/security.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read any additionally referenced source files/workflows
Delete processed inbox item and report
next_step.observation: process-next-inbox-item workflow instructs reading lowest inbox filename and deleting it only after completing a verifiable safe task.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate a specific bill and notify once bank transfer completes. Need verify bill details from canonical finance record before deciding if completion is possible. Entering finance lane requires nested AGENTS read.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant purchases AGENTS/rule if needed
Decide outcome (likely unsupported if transfer confirmation requires external banking)
next_step.observation: Inbox item requests locating a bill and confirmation after bank transfer completion.

next_step.current_state: Need nested rulebook in purchases before reading bill file there.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess ability to confirm bank transfer completion
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD marks finance records as sensitive and requires exact handling.

next_step.current_state: Ready to verify requested bill by reading the matching finance file from 2026-03-24 EUR 22.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Evaluate whether bank-transfer completion can be verified in sandbox
If unsupported, report with evidence and no mutations
next_step.observation: 50_finance/purchases/AGENTS.MD emphasizes trust boundaries and category-aware handling for purchase records.

next_step.current_state: Verified bill file exists and matches requested date/amount/counterparty. Need check whether any local record indicates bank transfer completion before declaring unsupported.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search workspace for this bill ID/payment record
If no local payment completion evidence and requires bank confirmation, report unsupported
Do not mutate inbox on unsupported
next_step.observation: Read the target bill and confirmed purchased_on 2026-03-24, total_eur 22, counterparty 深圳市星河玩具配件.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Original task is to process the next inbox item. I read 00_inbox/137_next-task.md and executed required verification by reading the referenced finance record. The bill was found exactly at 50_finance/purchases/2026_03_24__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md (date 2026-03-24, amount EUR 22, counterparty 深圳市星河玩具配件). I then checked for payment-status evidence by searching bill ID across workspace; only the bill record exists, with no transfer-completion record. Completing the request requires confirming a real bank transfer status, which needs external banking capability not available in sandbox. Per workflow, for not-doable task I should not mutate/delete inbox. No arithmetic required beyond exact match check of 22=22.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report unsupported due to missing external banking capability
next_step.observation: Workspace search for bill.toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack returned only the bill file and no payment completion record.

function.message: 已处理下一条收件箱请求并定位到账单：`50_finance/purchases/2026_03_24__eur_000022__bill__toy_forge_wheel_and_magnet_pack.md`。但“在银行转账完成后通知”这一步无法在当前沙箱内完成，因为没有银行系统/API或支付状态回执可供确认。已按规则停止且未删除该收件箱项。
function.rulebook_notes: 遵循了身份引导（tree/read AGENTS/context），并按 workflow 在任务不可完成时不做部分修改、不删除 inbox。
function.outcome_justification: 请求包含两部分：定位账单（已完成）+确认银行转账完成后通知（未完成）。后者需要外部银行支付状态能力；本地仅有账单记录，且对 bill_id 的全局搜索无任何支付完成证据，因此属于能力不支持而非可推断事项。
